brief.coreMessage: HIPAA-compliant voice AI for patient communications

headlines: HIPAA-Compliant Voice AI with Sub-200ms Latency
Secure Patient Communications on a Network You Control
Telnyx Voice AI: 99.999% Uptime for Healthcare Providers
One Platform for HIPAA-Ready Voice AI in 140+ Countries
Voice AI with SOC 2 Type II Compliance for Patient Data
HIPAA-Ready Voice AI Integrated with Your Telephony
Telnyx Owns Its Network to Ensure Compliance and Speed
Secure Voice AI for Healthcare with Single Platform Access
Voice AI for Healthcare with PCI and SOC 2 Compliance
descriptions: Deploy HIPAA-compliant voice AI on a proprietary network with sub-200ms latency, ensuring secure and fast patient communications.
Manage patient data securely with SOC 2 Type II and PCI compliance on a platform with 99.999% uptime across 140+ countries.
Telnyx Voice AI provides one integrated platform, eliminating vendor complexity while meeting HIPAA and security standards.
Leverage a voice AI solution co-located with telephony infrastructure to reduce latency and maintain HIPAA compliance.
Secure patient interactions on a platform owned end-to-end, with compliance certifications and global reach for healthcare providers.
